text.message: He was prob gonna knight and he robbed me last time lol
oj will you trade me that sheep for nb?
I have lots of wheat and wood
Yeah, we need oj with army to stand any chance at all here
Says the dude who just traded him 2:1 lol
i offered those to both you and oj
At some point you gotta realize you won't be able to cash in on nb deals
so who is gonna fight black on road once he has army
I am actually in a good spot for it, only the 9s have mostly been quiet
lots of debs one of you has mono
Or, I mean do whatever you want. Gotta do something when behind
I'll do it if you need it
black has best production an gets army...
and can easily steal road too
thats what i was saying all game
Black has far easier way to win here
red takes army before i can get road
A few fives and sixes and you take it. Or you just city twice
red if you take army it shoudl be blue
blue u lied last time haha
i needed to breal your devs to have a chance
Fair. Would've nonbinded here as well xD
gg if red doesnt take army here
he dont have much wood if any
you nonbinded me allready i cant make deals with you anymore
I would've taken that trade if it was for pop
you nonbinded when i was at 5
Can't trust me? It was a trade lol
you can have you brick back if you want to extend
black just wins next round if we dont 7 i think
I mean, every which way really
Except for ojs misery, this has been a great game tho
Gotta love when I can pull out the non bind
